description_long: This is a small bird with a compact body, short tail, and a slightly conical beak. Its plumage is primarily dark brown to black on the upperparts, with a lighter, yellowish-brown coloration on the underparts. The head is dark, with a pale patch near the eye and a subtle gradient to the lighter throat and belly. The legs are thin and appear pale, almost pinkish, and the feet are delicate with slender toes. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail feathers are short and slightly splayed. The overall appearance suggests a passerine bird commonly found in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, dark brown and yellowish bird with a short tail, conical beak, and pale legs, typical of urban passerines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's compact body, dark upperparts, yellowish underparts, and short tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the splayed tail feathers and thin, pale legs with visible toes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the beak and head markings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the conical beak, dark head, and the gradient from dark to lighter underparts.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark upperparts with lighter yellowish underparts and a pale facial patch
